title: Principal AI Software Engineer
description:
Job Description SummaryWe are seeking a highly accomplished
Principal AI Software Engineer who has mastered AI-augmented
development and can drive technical excellence across our
organization. This senior leadership role requires someone
who combines exceptional technical depth with strategic
thinking, leading the development of complex AI-native
applications while setting technical direction and mentoring
engineering teams. You'll be responsible for architecting
enterprise-scale systems, driving cross-team technical
initiatives, and establishing the standards that define how
our organization builds AI-powered software.  The ideal
candidate will have 10+ years of professional software
development experience with proven expertise in designing
and shipping large-scale production applications that
incorporate LLMs and AI services. This is a Principal-level
position requiring strong technical leadership, systems
thinking, and the ability to influence technical decisions
across multiple teams and product areas. As a GE Vernova
accelerator, GE Vernova Advanced Research is driving
strategy and leading research & development efforts to
execute on the business’s mission to help power the energy
transition. We forge the collaborations and help invent the
technologies required to electrify and decarbonize for a
zero-carbon future. Representing virtually every major
scientific and engineering discipline, our researchers are
collaborating with GE Vernova’s businesses, the U.S.
government, and more than 420 entities at the forefront of
technology to execute on 150+ energy focused projects.
Collectively, these research programs and initiatives aim to
solve near term technical challenges, deliver next
generation product advances, and drive long term
breakthrough innovation to enable more affordable, reliable,
sustainable, and secure energy.

Job Description

Key job responsibilities

As a Principal AI Software Engineer, you will drive
technical strategy and excellence across multiple
initiatives while leading complex AI system development.

Strategic Technical Leadership:

- Define and drive technical vision and architecture for AI-
  native applications across multiple product areas
- Act as an enabler for successful execution of identified
  projects
- Lead cross-functional technical initiatives, collaborating
  with engineering leadership, product management, and data
  science teams
- Establish technical standards, design patterns, and best
  practices for AI-augmented development across the
  organization
- Drive technical decision-making for complex systems that
  span multiple teams and products
- Make decisions with confidence when problems or solutions
  are not well defined
- Manage risk and uncertainty for self and team within a
  dynamic priority-setting environment
- Contribute as a thought leader within the team, and help to
  refine current state as well as future state plans and
  product roadmaps

Advanced AI Systems Architecture:

- Design and architect enterprise-scale full stack
  applications with sophisticated AI integrations across
  natural language processing, computer vision, and
  predictive analytics
- Lead the development of complex, multi-tenant AI systems
  serving millions of users with high availability and
  performance requirements
- Architect advanced RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
  systems, agentic workflows, and autonomous AI
  architectures
- Design cost-efficient, scalable LLM integration strategies
  across multiple providers with advanced optimization and
  failover mechanisms
- Establish frameworks for AI model evaluation, A/B testing,
  and performance optimization at enterprise scale

Cross-Team Technical Influence:

- Drive adoption of emerging AI technologies and evaluate
  their strategic impact on product development
- Lead technical due diligence and integration planning for
  major AI technology decisions
- Collaborate with external partners, vendors, and research
  institutions on cutting-edge AI initiatives
- Establish monitoring, observability, and cost management
  frameworks for AI systems across the organization
- Contribute to open source projects and represent the company
  at technical conferences and industry events

Engineering Excellence & Innovation:

- Champion engineering best practices including comprehensive
  testing, code quality, security, and scalability standards
- Expert in Agile Development
- Lead investigation and proof-of-concept development for
  emerging AI technologies and methodologies
- Drive technical innovation initiatives that differentiate
  our AI capabilities in the market
- Establish and maintain technical documentation,
  architectural decision records, and knowledge sharing
  practices
- Lead incident response and post-mortem processes for complex
  AI system issues

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

- Master’s Degree in Electrical, Computer Science, Computer
  Engineering, Robotics or related field
- 10+ years of non-internship professional software
  development experience
- 12+ years of programming using JavaScript/TypeScript and
  multiple backend languages (Python preferred, Node.js,
  Java, or Go)
- 6+ years of experience with modern front-end frameworks
  (React, Vue, or Angular) and advanced state management
  patterns
- Proven track record designing and shipping complex
  production applications that incorporate LLMs or AI
  services at enterprise scale (1M+ users)
- Advanced expertise in prompt engineering, model
  optimization, and deep understanding of AI system
  limitations and capabilities
- Demonstrated experience with agentic workflows and
  autonomous AI system architectures
- Extensive experience leading technical teams, driving cross-
  team initiatives, and providing technical mentorship
- Expert-level experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or
  Azure) and advanced containerization (EKS), orchestration,
  and infrastructure as code (GitOps)
- Strong background in system design, scalability, and
  performance optimization for high-traffic applications
- Must be willing to work out of an office located in
  Bangalore JFWTC Campus
- You must submit your application for employment on the
  careers page at www.careers.gevernova.com to be
  considered.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

- 18+ years of full software development lifecycle experience,
  including architecture design, technical leadership, and
  large-scale system optimization
- Expert-level experience with vector databases (Pinecone,
  Weaviate, pgvector) and advanced embedding model
  optimization
- Deep expertise with multiple LLM providers and advanced AI
  orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, custom
  frameworks)
- Advanced understanding of enterprise RAG architectures,
  semantic search optimization, and conversation memory
  management at massive scale
- Experience with multi-modal AI integration, model fine-
  tuning, and deployment of custom AI models
- Track record of building and scaling AI-powered features for
  10M+ users with high availability requirements
- Expert knowledge of AI observability tools, cost
  optimization strategies, and performance monitoring at
  enterprise scale
- Master's degree or PhD in computer science, AI/ML, or
  equivalent advanced technical education
- Extensive experience with agent architectures, autonomous AI
  systems, and cutting-edge agentic workflow implementations
- Background in machine learning research, AI safety, or
  advanced AI system design
- Experience with technical strategy development and
  technology roadmap planning

Technical Stack

Languages: Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, SQL, Go/Rust (for
performance-critical components) Frontend: React/Next.js,
Vue.js, Advanced CSS frameworks, Progressive Web Apps,
Micro-frontends Backend: Node.js/Express, FastAPI,
PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB, Event-driven architectures,
Microservices AI/ML: OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude API,
Advanced LangChain implementations, pgvector, Pinecone,
Custom model deployments, Advanced agentic workflow
frameworks Infrastructure: Enterprise AWS/Azure services,
Advanced Kubernetes, Service mesh, Infrastructure as Code,
Multi-region deployments Development Tools: GitHub Copilot,
Advanced AI-assisted development environments, Custom
tooling and automation Monitoring: Enterprise observability
platforms, Advanced LLM cost monitoring, Performance
optimization tools, Custom analytics

Additional Information

Relocation Assistance Provided: Yes
responsibilities: Define and drive technical vision and architecture for AI-native applications across multiple product areas
Design and architect enterprise-scale full stack applications with sophisticated AI integrations across NLP, computer vision, and predictive analytics
Architect advanced RAG systems, agentic workflows, and autonomous AI architectures
Design cost-efficient, scalable LLM integration strategies across multiple providers with optimization and failover mechanisms
Establish technical standards, design patterns, and best practices for AI-augmented development across the organization
Lead cross-functional technical initiatives and drive technical decision-making for complex systems spanning multiple teams
Establish monitoring, observability, and cost management frameworks for AI systems across the organization
Champion engineering best practices including testing, code quality, security, and scalability standards
use_cases: Enterprise-scale AI-native applications serving millions of users
RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems for knowledge retrieval and question answering
Agentic workflows and autonomous AI architectures
Predictive analytics for energy and industrial applications
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves direct hands-on work building AI-native
applications including RAG systems, agentic workflows, and
LLM integrations. The candidate is responsible for
architecting and deploying these AI systems, not just
supporting them.
